h1.visual_description: Not explicitly present on this page; inferred from footer style as Sans-serif, All-caps/Small-caps, medium weight.

h2.visual_description: Large, bold, Sans-serif single characters used as sub-figure identifiers.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Page footer containing document title and page number

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Author-date style in parentheses, e.g., (Yoeli et al. 2013)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Bottom-right footer text (e.g., 'BEHAVIORAL ECONOMICS PRACTICUM 213') should be excluded from main body text extraction.
